description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a double-breasted blazer with lapels, a collared shirt, and a necktie. The figure wears fitted trousers and formal dress shoes, presenting a professional and polished appearance. Her arms are slightly extended outward, and her hands are relaxed at her sides. The hair is long, straight, and parted in the middle, falling past the shoulders. The facial features are neutral, with a composed expression. The overall build is slender and proportionate, suitable for urban environments such as city streets or office districts.
description: A female adult in formal business attire with a blazer, trousers, and dress shoes, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She has long, straight hair and a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full business suit, necktie, and facial features with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the fitted nature of the blazer and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, the length and flow of the hair, and the straight cut of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, hair, and the side seam details of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with a double-breasted blazer, collared shirt, necktie, and fitted trousers
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted in the middle
